subject: Swift Trigger 1186391 is not a GRB
body:
B. Sbarufatti (INAF-OAB) report on behalf of the Neil Gehrels Swift
Observatory Team:

Swift BAT trigger 1186391 at 15:25:12.13 UT on 2023-08-21, is due
to misidentification of a known source during a Star Tracker
Loss-of-Lock. It is not  an astrophysical event.
